title: thelymitra paludosa
intro: Thelymitra paludosa, also known as the marsh sun orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelymitra paludosa are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Thelymitra paludosa is typically prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its herbal remedies.
